title: Netflix: Key-Value Cache Architecture and SSD Tiering for Scale
summary: A deep dive into Netflix's dynamic key-value storage system utilizing SSD storage tiering to cache personalization profiles, optimizing RAM utilization and reducing infrastructure costs.
seller_pitch: Leverage solid-state technology to achieve RAM-like read latency at a tenth of the memory-hardware budget.
why_it_matters: Provides an architectural blueprint for scaling real-time personalization caches without incurring runaway RAM expenses.
build_opportunities: Open-source a lightweight RocksDB-based SSD caching proxy for Redis
Build a custom tiering storage adapter for containerized SQLite
risks: Increased latency spikes during intense cache eviction cycles
Higher wear-and-tear degradation on target SSD hardware under extreme write loads

verification_status.notes: Solid enterprise architecture article. High credibility but represents an incremental system optimization rather than a fundamental scientific discovery.
